race.comment: OUR BRAVE LINI (8) didn't measure up in G2 company two back before just missing the placings at the Gold Coast last time out. Has a handy record at this circuit with a win and a placing from just two attempts and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. CAST PARTY (1) will be at peak fitness now fourth run back, draws favourably in gate two and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race of this calibre. BIG TECH (5) has hit the top-five at his past six outings and is usually thereabouts. A must for the multiples. TESSTIFY TRIO (6) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
